cards.back: The process of managing and regulating the interaction among group members to achieve a common goal or objective
A phenomenon where group members may have conflicting opinions or goals, leading to a state of mutual exclusion, where one person's success depends on the other person's failure
The process of reaching a consensus among group members on a decision, action, or course of action
The ways in which group members interact and manage their communication, such as hierarchical, egalitarian, or democratic patterns
A communication strategy where one group member defers to another, often to avoid conflict or ensure smooth coordination
